title: PictureButton
text: PictureButton Logical widget that represents a field as a clickable image. Table 1. Widget Summary Logical widget name: PictureButton PictureButton_updatable Maps to physical widget: image Default definition: image(clientsyntaxcheck=false)[syntax=ned] image(clientsyntaxcheck=false) Supported triggers and properties: See image Used for: Image fields The PictureButton comes in two versions: PictureButton—field value cannot be modifed at runtime. The field syntax is set to NED (non-editable) in usys.ini . PictureButton_updatable—field value can be changed at runtime using the Uniface JavaScript API ( setValue() ). Widget Property Restrictions The following restrictions apply: It is not possible to set the html:src property for this widget. To change an image, you must change the field value.
